title: oenothera hartwegii subsp. filifolia
intro: Oenothera hartwegii subsp. filifolia, also known as Californian evening primrose, is a type of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera hartwegii subsp. filifolia include potential relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
